headline: 2020 finalist in International Reporting with the staff of Reuters for our coverage of the Hong Kong protest. 2023 and 2024 Pulitzer Prize winner in International Reporting with the staff of The New York Times for our coverage of the war in Ukraine and Gaza respectively.
In Nov. 2023 the School of Journalism and Strategic Communication of Ball State University presented me this award recognizing innovation and leadership in the profession of graphic journalism.

Hostsed by the University of Navarra, the Malofiej Awards were considered the pinnacle of recognition for information design. As of June 2021, I coined 41 of their medals, including three gold medals and the Special Award Miguel Urabayen to the Best Map.
As of April 2026, I have won 206 awards from the Society For News Design (SND). In 2022, I was awarded the title of “Best Designer in the World” during the 43rd edition for my work with Reuters.
